keyPoints: Segmentation and Fragmentation: TCP breaks data into smaller segments
Connection Establishment: 3-way handshake to set up a TCP connection
Flow Control: Prevents network congestion by regulating data transmission
Error Control: Uses ACKs and sequence numbers to detect and correct errors
Congestion Control: Prevents network congestion by regulating data transmission
Windowing: Establishes a communication window to regulate data transmission
Sliding Window: Adjusts the window size based on network conditions
Checksums: Calculates a checksum to detect errors in data transmission
